raw.advertiser_name: Bomber Ace: WW2 war plane game
raw.message: Air raids and dogfights are waiting!

hook.summary: Intense aerial assault on an aircraft carrier.
hook.visual_action: Planes dive-bomb and strafe a large aircraft carrier while anti-aircraft fire creates massive explosions.

scene_flow: Planes approach the aircraft carrier under heavy fire.
Explosions rock the deck as planes are targeted by anti-aircraft guns.
Dogfights occur directly above the ship with targeting reticles appearing.
The carrier sustains multiple hits as the aerial battle reaches its peak.
audience_proxy: Men aged 18-45 who enjoy military history and combat strategy games.
